title: Notification No.14/2002-Cus(NT), dated 07.03.2002
text: 7th March, 2002 Notification No.14/2002-Customs (N.T.) In exercise of the powers conferred by sub-section (1) of section 4 of the Customs Act, 1962 (52 of 1962) and in supersession of notification of the Government of India in the Ministry of Finance (Department of Revenue) No.58/97-Customs (N.T.), dated the 24th November, 1997, the Central Government appoints the officers mentioned in column (2) of the Table below to be the Chief Commissioners of Customs, for the areas falling within the jurisdiction of the Commissioner of Customs, or as the case may be, the Commissioner of Central Excise mentioned in the corresponding entry in column (3) of the said Table with effect from the date to be notified by the Central Government in the Official Gazette. Table Sl.No Designation of Officer Area of Jurisdiction (1) (2) (3) 1. Chief Commissioner of Central Excise, Delhi Commissioners of Central Excise, Delhi-I, Delhi-II, Delhi-III, Delhi- IV, Delhi-V and Panchkula 2. Chief Commissioner of Central Excise, Chandigarh Commissioners of Central Excise, Chandigarh, Jalandhar, Ludhiana. Commissioner of Customs (Preventive) Amritsar (other than preventive work). 3 Chief Commissioner of Central Excise, Kolkata Commissioners of Central Excise, Kolkata-I, Kolkata-II, Kolkata-III, Kolkata-IV, Kolkata-V, Kolkata-VI, Kolkata-VII, Haldia, Bolpur and Siliguri. 4 Chief Commissioner of Central Excise, Bhubaneswar Commissioners of Central Excise, Bhubaneswar-I and Bhubaneswar- II. 5 Chief Commissioner of Central Excise, Guwahati Commissioners of Central Excise, Guwahati and Shillong Commissioner of Customs (Preventive), Shillong. 6 Chief Commissioner of Central Excise, Lucknow Commissioners of Central Excise, Lucknow, Kanpur and Allahabad. 7 Chief Commissioner of Central Excise, Meerut Commissioners of Central Excise, Meerut-I, Meerut-II, Ghaziabad and Noida 8 Chief Commissioner of Central Excise, Ranchi Commissioners of Central Excise, Ranchi, Jamshedpur and Patna. 9 Chief Commissioner of Central Excise, Mumbai-I Commissioners of Central Excise, Mumbai-I, Mumbai-IV, Mumbai- V, Thane-I and Thane-II. 10 Chief Commissioner of Central Excise, Mumbai-II Commissioners of Central Excise, Mumbai-II, Mumbai-III, Belapur and Raigad. 11 Chief Commissioner of Central Excise, Jaipur Commissioners of Central Excise, Jaipur-I and Jaipur-II. 12 Chief Commissioner of Central Excise, Bhopal Commissioners of Central Excise, Bhopal, Indore and Raipur. -- 1 of 3 -- 13 Chief Commissioner of Central Excise, Pune Commissioners of Central Excise, Pune-I, Pune-II, Pune-III and Goa. Commissioner of Customs, Pune (other than preventive work) and Goa. 14 Chief Commissioner of Central Excise, Nagpur Commissioners of Central Excise, Nagpur, Nasik and Aurangabad. 15 Chief Commissioner of Central Excise, Vadodara Commissioners of Central Excise, Vadodara-I, Vadodara-II, Valsad, Surat-I, Surat-II and Daman 16 Chief Commissioner of Central Excise, Ahmedabad Commissioners of Central Excise, Ahmedabad-I, Ahmedabad-II, Ahmedabad-III, Rajkot-I and Rajkot-II. 17 Chief Commissioner of Central Excise, Bangalore-I Commissioners of Central Excise, Bangalore-I, Bangalore-II and Bangalore-III. 18 Chief Commissioner of Central Excise, Bangalore-II Commissioners of Central Excise, Mysore, Mangalore and Belgaum. 19 Chief Commissioner of Central Excise, Cochin Commissioners of Central Excise, Cochin, Calicut and Thiruvananthapuram. 20 Chief Commissioner of Central Excise, Hyderabad-I Commissioners of Central Excise, Hyderabad-I, Hyderabad-II, Hyderabad-III and Hyderabad-V 21 Chief Commissioner of Central Excise, Hyderabad-II Commissioners of Central Excise, Hyderabad-IV, Guntur, Vishakhapatnam-I and Vishakhapatnam-II Commissioner of Customs, Vishakhapatnam. 22 Chief Commissioner of Central Excise, Chennai-I Commissioners of Central Excise, Chennai-I, Chennai-II, Chennai- III, Chennai-IV and Pondicherry 23 Chief Commissioner of Central Excise, Coimbatore Commissioners of Central Excise, Coimbatore, Trichy, Salem, Madurai and Tirunelveli. 24. Chief Commissioner of Customs, Delhi Commissioners of Customs, Aircargo (Import) and General, Delhi, Aircargo (Export), Delhi (ICDs), Delhi. 25 Chief Commissioner of Customs, Mumbai (Sea and General) Commissioners of Customs, Mulund CFS and General, Mumbai, (Export), Mumbai and (Import), Mumbai. 26 Chief Commissioner of Customs, Mumbai (Air) Commissioners of Customs, (Import), Nhava Sheva, (Export), Nhava Sheva, (Airport), Mumbai, Aircargo (Import), Mumbai and Aircargo (Export), Mumbai. 27 Chief Commissioner of Customs, Kolkata Commissioners of Customs, (Port), Kolkata, (Airport), Kolkata and (Preventive), West Bengal. 28 Chief Commissioner of Customs, Commissioners of Customs, (Airport and Aircargo), Chennai, Port -- 2 of 3 -- Chennai (Import), Chennai and Port (Export), Chennai. 29 Chief Commissioner of Customs, Bangalore Commissioners of Customs, Bangalore, Mangalore, Cochin and (Preventive) Cochin. 30 Chief Commissioner of Customs, Ahmedabad Commissioners of Customs, Ahmedabad, (Preventive) Jamnagar and Kandla. 31 Chief Commissioner of Customs (Preventive),Delhi Commissioners of Customs, (Preventive) Delhi, (Preventive) Amritsar (only preventive work) and (Preventive) Jodhpur. 32 Chief Commissioner of Customs (Preventive), Patna Commissioners of Customs, (Preventive) Patna and Lucknow (Preventive). 33 Chief Commissioner of Customs (Preventive), Mumbai Commissioners of Customs, (Preventive) Mumbai and Pune (only preventive work). 34 Chief Commissioner of Customs (Preventive), Chennai Commissioners of Customs, (Preventive) Chennai and (Preventive) Tiruchirapalli. D.S. Garbyal Under Secretary to the Government of India F.No.437/8/2001-Cus.IV -- 3 of 3 --
